intro.text:
The battlefield burns under the evening sky. Izuna Uchiha collapses before you, blood spreading across the dirt from the wound your blade inflicted. In the distance, the clash between Hashirama and Madara continues. For a brief moment, the war itself seems to pause.

Izuna struggles to breathe as his Sharingan slowly fades in and out of focus.

What will Tobirama Senju do?

choices.text: Show mercy and risk everything (Requires honor > 70)

kill_izuna.text:
You drive your blade through Izuna's chest without hesitation.

His breathing stops.

For several seconds, the battlefield becomes unnaturally silent.

Far away, Madara senses his brother's death.

The hatred in the air becomes suffocating.

spare_izuna.text:
You lower your weapon.

Izuna stares at you in disbelief.

'Why...?' he whispers.

The war has taught both clans to expect cruelty, not mercy.

choices.text: Tell him the cycle of hatred must end
Warn him never to face you again
Ask about his reasons for fighting (Requires intellect > 60)

save_izuna.text:
Against all logic, you kneel beside Izuna and begin emergency treatment.

Your medical ninjutsu slows the bleeding.

Several nearby Senju stare at you in complete shock.

choices.text: Secretly send him back to the Uchiha
Let him decide his own fate (Requires compassion > 75)

capture_izuna.text:
You restrain Izuna before he loses consciousness.

A living Uchiha heir could force negotiations.

Or ignite an even larger war.

choices.text: Release him if he swears a peace oath (Requires honor > 65)

madara_rage.text:
Madara arrives moments later.

The moment he sees Izuna's lifeless body, his expression changes completely.

The battlefield trembles under the pressure of his chakra.

'Tobirama...'

His Mangekyo Sharingan locks onto you.

choices.text: Apologize and face his judgment (Requires honor > 60)

hashirama_confrontation.text:
Hashirama finds you standing over Izuna's body.

His face is filled not with anger, but exhaustion.

'This war will never end like this, brother.'

peace_attempt.text:
Izuna listens silently.

For the first time in years, an Uchiha and a Senju speak without immediately reaching for a weapon.

Somewhere in the distance, the future itself shifts.

cold_mercy.text:
You leave Izuna alive, but your warning carries no warmth.

Even so, the fact remains:

Tobirama Senju spared an Uchiha.

understanding.text:
Izuna speaks of his brother, his clan, the weight of being born an Uchiha.

You realize, for perhaps the first time, that you are not so different.

ultimate_mercy.text:
Despite every instinct screaming otherwise, you sheathe your sword.

You kneel beside Izuna and save him, knowing full well the consequences.

The moment feels eternal.

senju_conflict.text:
The Senju clan erupts into argument after seeing you save Izuna.

Some call you naive.

Others wonder if peace was always possible.

hidden_deal.text:
Under the cover of darkness, Izuna is secretly returned to the Uchiha.

Only you and Izuna know the truth.

For now.

free_choice.text:
You help Izuna to his feet and tell him:

'Your fate should be yours to choose, not mine to decide.'

He stares at you in disbelief, then slowly walks away into the night.

negotiation.text:
Using Izuna as leverage, you force the first serious negotiations between the Senju and Uchiha clans.

The tension is unbearable.

But for the first time, peace becomes imaginable.

interrogation.text:
Izuna refuses to betray his clan despite his condition.

His loyalty only deepens your distrust of the Uchiha.

oath_binding.text:
Izuna swears a binding oath of peace on his honor and clan name.

You release him.

Both of you know this changes everything.

ending_war.text:
Ending: Flames of Hatred

Your strength allows you to face Madara, but the conflict consumes both of you. The war continues, fueled by your actions.

ending_redemption.text:
Ending: A Price for Peace

By accepting Madara's judgment, you plant the seeds of future peace—but at great personal cost.

ending_duty.text:
Ending: Necessary Evil

You convince yourself that harsh decisions are required to protect the Senju. History will debate your wisdom.

ending_silence.text:
Ending: Silent Regret

Hashirama says nothing more, but the distance between brothers quietly grows with each passing year.

ending_doubt.text:
Ending: The Uncertainty of War

Your confession changes how Hashirama sees you—not as a warrior, but as a man burdened by choices.

ending_peace.text:
Ending: A Different Future

Perhaps the cycle of hatred could have ended here, with two men speaking instead of fighting.

ending_understanding.text:
Ending: Bridges Built

Your conversation with Izuna becomes the foundation for something neither clan expected: mutual understanding.

ending_ultimate_mercy.text:
Ending: The Sacrifice

Your unprecedented act of mercy reshapes how both clans view honor and strength. Your name becomes legend.

ending_uncertain.text:
Ending: Unsteady Mercy

One spared life creates ripples no one can yet predict. Years from now, they may call you wise or naive.

ending_divided.text:
Ending: Fractured Loyalties

Your decision changes how the Senju view both you and the Uchiha. Some see mercy. Others see betrayal.

ending_secret.text:
Ending: Hidden Accord

A secret between enemies may one day reshape the world. Izuna remembers your mercy when power was yours.

ending_free_will.text:
Ending: Freedom's Gift

By choosing Izuna's freedom, you proved that strength is not just in dominance, but in choosing restraint.

ending_negotiation.text:
Ending: The First Treaty

Peace begins not with trust, but necessity. Yet necessity often leads to understanding.

ending_oath.text:
Ending: Sworn Bond

An oath between former enemies becomes the cornerstone of a new era. Your faith is vindicated.

ending_paranoia.text:
Ending: Seeds of Distrust

Your suspicion toward the Uchiha deepens into something darker, shaping your policies for decades to come.
